brief: Markets slide on AI spending fears as US election integrity debate heats up, while UK's new Labour leader Burnham takes office and wildfires rage in Ontario. In research, studies probe ChatGPT's impact on writing and human-robot juggling, alongside narrative visualization in sports videos.
news_summary: Stocks fell amid anxiety over US-China AI competition and Trump's renewed election fraud claims, while Andy Burnham became UK Labour leader and Ontario battled wildfires. Also notable: China's Xi appeared at an AI conference, and Hong Kong continued book bans under national security law.
papers_summary: Research on second-language writing examined ChatGPT's effect on personal statements and noun phrase complexity, while computer science papers explored AI coding agent vulnerabilities, human-robot juggling, and narrative visualization in swimming videos.

en.brief: Markets slide on AI spending fears as US election integrity debate heats up, while UK's new Labour leader Burnham takes office and wildfires rage in Ontario. In research, studies probe ChatGPT's impact on writing and human-robot juggling, alongside narrative visualization in sports videos.
en.news_summary: Stocks fell amid anxiety over US-China AI competition and Trump's renewed election fraud claims, while Andy Burnham became UK Labour leader and Ontario battled wildfires. Also notable: China's Xi appeared at an AI conference, and Hong Kong continued book bans under national security law.
en.papers_summary: Research on second-language writing examined ChatGPT's effect on personal statements and noun phrase complexity, while computer science papers explored AI coding agent vulnerabilities, human-robot juggling, and narrative visualization in swimming videos.

zh.brief: 英国新任首相贝安德就职，引发对中英关系前景的讨论；习近平首度现身世界AI大会，强调开源战略；香港国安法下禁书清单持续扩大；特朗普再提2020年选举舞弊指控。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德就任英国工党党魁，即将成为首相，其中国政策走向受关注；习近平出席世界AI大会，将开源作为中国AI核心战略；香港国安法下多本书籍被下架或点名，禁书清单不断更新。
zh.papers_summary: 本日无优先级中文论文，英文论文主要涉及第二语言写作中名词短语复杂度、ChatGPT对写作的影响等研究。

todays_image.caption: Just as the horse and carriage were eventually outpaced by new technology, today's stock market jitters reflect fears that massive AI spending may be overhyped and due for a similar reckoning.
todays_image.title: Horse and carriage
